name: Apple Pizza#1
recipeIngredient: Butter, unsalted - cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together filling, sugar, cinnamon and vanilla extract.
2. Mix pie crust sticks according to directions and place the dough on a pizza pan.
3. Put on apples, add pats of butter.
4. Put on top crust, crimp edges and roll under.
5. Bake at 425°F for 45 minutes. Remove from oven and cool.
6. Mix frosting ingredients and spread on top crust of cooled pie.
